name: Cineverse Corp.
summary: Cineverse Corp. (CNVS) is an entertainment technology company focused on streaming and digital distribution of content. The company operates streaming channels and platforms, distributes films and other content through in-theatre, online, and mobile services. Cineverse serves targeted entertainment markets and has pursued growth through acquisitions and new digital media initiatives.

products.name: Streaming Channels
products.description: Digital streaming channels distributing entertainment content to consumers online.

products.name: In-Theatre Distribution Services
products.description: Distribution of content through in-theatre services to cinema audiences.

products.name: Online and Mobile Distribution Services
products.description: Distribution of content through online and mobile platforms.
